categories.label: Trade Routes
categories.description: Points from connecting cities (multiply the 2 city values together)

categories.label: Villages Discovered
categories.description: Points earned from discovering villages by completing regions

categories.label: Discovery Towers
categories.description: Points earned from placing discovery towers on discovery spaces

categories.label: Coin Spaces
categories.description: Coins earned from exploring coin spaces on the map

categories.label: Goal Cards
categories.description: Points earned from completing the 3 goal card objectives

categories.label: Treasure Cards
categories.description: Points from treasure cards collected at ruin spaces (including vase sets)

categories.label: Crystal Spaces (Cnidaria)
categories.description: Points from exploring sonulux crystal spaces (Cnidaria map only)

win_condition: Most coins wins. Tiebreaker: most discovery towers, then most villages.
